title: Legal Executive
description:
• Work directly with senior practitioners.
  • Grow quickly in a dynamic environment.

About Our Client

Our client is a boutique law firm in Singapore with two experienced lawyers specialising in Civil Litigation and General Corporate work.

Job Description

Administrative & Operational Support

  • Coordinate schedules, appointments, and internal workflows.
  • Oversee communication with clients and external parties.
  • Maintain organised digital and physical filing systems in line with data‑protection obligations.
  • Assist with billing processes, timesheet monitoring, and basic accounts administration.
  • Support the smooth functioning of day‑to‑day office operations.



Legal & Case Support

  • Conduct legal research using statutory and case‑law databases.
  • Prepare, review, and format documents such as contracts, pleadings, affidavits, and letters.
  • Assist with preparation of case bundles, exhibits, and deadlines for hearings or negotiations.
  • Liaise with courts, counterpart lawyers, agencies, and other organisations.
  • Perform checks for due diligence matters and maintain internal records.
  • Contribute to drafting templates or internal tools to improve workflow.



The Successful Applicant

A successful Legal Executive should have:

  • Diploma in Law or related discipline; further legal certification is an advantage.
  • Minimum 1 year of experience in a legal support role (strong fresh graduates with relevant exposure may be considered).
  • Comfortable using productivity software, research platforms, and e‑filing systems.
  • Good understanding of procedural and substantive areas of law relevant to practice work.
  • Strong organisational habits and attention to detail.
  • Clear, professional communication and the ability to handle confidential matters discreetly.
  • Analytical thinker with the ability to learn quickly and work independently.
  • Reliable, proactive, and able to adapt in a small‑team setting.

What's on Offer

  • Competitive salary package
  • Potential benefits to be confirmed.
  • Opportunities for professional growth, including exposure to diverse legal work.
  • Standard office hours with the potential for hybrid work arrangements after probation.



If you are a motivated Legal Executive looking for a rewarding role in a dynamic law firm, apply now to take the next step in your career.
